  / __\ ___ _ __   ___| |__   / _ (_) | ___ | |_ 
 /__\/// _ \ '_ \ / __| '_ \ / /_)/ | |/ _ \| __|
/ \/  \  __/ | | | (__| | | / ___/| | | (_) | |_ 
\_____/\___|_| |_|\___|_| |_\/    |_|_|\___/ \__|

Agent-first device lifecycle CLI. Made by RavelloH.

Usage
  benchpilot <command> [arguments] [options]

Interactive mode
  home             Open the guided interactive interface

Get started
  init             Initialize a BenchPilot project in the current directory
  doctor           Check the local environment, dependencies, and external tools
  language         View or set the global CLI language

Environment and integration
  config           View and manage global and project configuration
  adapter          Inspect, manage, and diagnose device adapters

Resources and orchestration
  device           Discover, configure, and operate devices
  system           Configure, orchestrate, and operate multi-device systems

Audit and safety
  run              View operation records, execution logs, and artifacts
  approval         Inspect and handle human approval requests
  lock             Inspect and manage physical resource locks

Help
  upgrade          Check for and upgrade the BenchPilot CLI
  help             Show detailed help for a command
  version          Show BenchPilot and runtime version information

Global options
  --json           Output the final result as JSON
  --jsonl          Output structured events in JSON Lines format
  --config <path>  Use the configuration file at the specified path
  --agent          Run in agent mode for agents and automation
  --help           Show detailed help for the current command

EXAMPLES
  $ benchpilot device scan
  $ benchpilot device <device> status
  $ benchpilot device <device> status --json

Detailed help: benchpilot <command> --help
Repository: https://github.com/RavelloH/benchpilot
